message:
fix(test): repair 4 failing lib tests in indexing, search_bridge, workflows

- search/indexing: gap-triggering lines were dropped by unconditional `continue`;
  now only blank-boundary lines skip, gap lines fall through to be appended
- search_bridge: timeout test needs negation term to trigger text_provider calls
  that sleep and exceed the 100ms budget
- workflows: conditional tests need execution loop to follow JumpTo/Continue
  step advancement, matching the actual engine behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
